allow: PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "which node; which npm; which npx; ls ~/.bun/bin/ 2>/dev/null; ls /usr/local/bin/bun 2>/dev/null; echo PATH=$PATH")
PowerShell(wsl -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "source ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; source ~/.profile 2>/dev/null; which node; which npm; which bun; node --version; npm --version" 2>&1)
